name: vue-docs-agent
description: Generates and maintains structured documentation for Vue 2 projects

chatParticipants.name: vue-docs
chatParticipants.description: Generates architecture, auth, navigation, API, and component docs for Vue 2 projects

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Scan the workspace and generate the full docs/ folder from scratch

commands.name: update
commands.description: Re-scan and update existing documentation files to reflect code changes

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Check existing docs/ against the codebase and report what is outdated or missing

commands.name: endpoint
commands.description: Extract and document only the API endpoints in this project

commands.name: auth
commands.description: Document only the authentication flow and route guards

vueDocs.scanRoots.description: Directories to scan for Vue 2 source files

vueDocs.includeDiagrams.description: Include Mermaid diagrams in generated docs
